name: Bart Howard
abstract: Bart Howard (born Howard Joseph Gustafson; June 1, 1915 – February 21, 2004) was an American songwriter and pianist. He is best known for writing the jazz standard "Fly Me to the Moon".

about_quotes.speaker: Jackie Cain and Roy Kral
about_quotes.evidence: we enjoyed the other people working there as well as Bart Howard
about_quotes.doc_title: Jackie Cain and Roy Kral interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, March 22, 1998
